name: What results should I expect from voice search optimization for lawyers?
description: Expect better visibility for conversational searches, cleaner mobile content, and more qualified contact attempts from people with clear intent.

mainEntity.name: What results should I expect from voice search optimization for lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: The main outcome is better visibility for spoken, question-based searches and a stronger chance of getting contacted by people who are ready to act. It can also improve mobile usability and the clarity of your website overall.
acceptedAnswer.description: Expect better visibility for conversational searches, cleaner mobile content, and more qualified contact attempts from people with clear intent.
